offer: For property managers managing 5–15 properties, inefficient scheduling causes missed inspections. We provide a streamlined scheduling system instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem: Inefficient scheduling and logging of maintenance tasks
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about scheduling
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management
try_it: Let users try scheduling tool on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
